promoted_facts.fact: Minimum GP floor of $60,000 per calendar year triggers franchisor buyout right (Section 13.04.B.8 of Franchise Agreement)
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Not in reader report — discovered in Depth Pass 2 (contract burden) from Franchise Agreement page 140

promoted_facts.fact: Abandonment defined as ceasing to operate 5 separate business days in any 12-month period or 3 consecutive days
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Not in reader report — discovered in Depth Pass 2 from Franchise Agreement Section 13.04.B.4

promoted_facts.fact: Business Judgment clause (Section 18.05): Franchisor's decisions may not be second-guessed by any court/trier of fact, even when other alternatives are reasonable
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Not in reader report — discovered in Depth Pass 2 from Franchise Agreement page 130

promoted_facts.fact: All franchisee innovations, improvements, and advertising ideas become franchisor's property (Section 2.01.B)
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Not in reader report — discovered in Depth Pass 2

promoted_facts.fact: Revenue recognition: royalty range stated as 5%-22% in Note 2 (vs 9%-22% in Item 6). The 5% reflects incentive-adjusted rates.
Purchase Price formula: 1x trailing 12-month GP + FMV of tangible assets (equipment at cost less 2%/month depreciation; materials/supplies/inventory at cost)
promoted_facts.source_reader_report: Partially in reader report (Section E) but without depreciation formula detail

promoted_facts.fact: Hawaii addendum deletes Section 19 (confidentiality/non-disparagement) of Franchise Agreement entirely
